converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Frank T. Wood papers
Wood, Frank T.
4865
3.4 cubic feet. 3.4 cubic feet.
1930-1993. Correspondence, photographs, topical files, and other material. Correspondence, photographs, topical files, and other material of a Syracuse, New York social welfare leader; also includes family papers and photographs. Collection material in English 2315873
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. FloodM.E. Warren
Date completed:
November 1994
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, April 2004
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, photographs, topical files, and other material of a Syracuse, New York social welfare leader; includes family papers and photographs. Subjects include African-American social and political life, literature programs in Africa, black fraternal orders, Republican politics, and other matters of social welfare. Also, transcripts of an interview with Peggy Wood.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Personal papers
Boxes 1, 3-4
Series II. Correspondence
Box 1
Series III. Speeches and notes
Box 1
Series IV. Subject files
Boxes 1-2
Series V. Episcopal Church, Diocese of Central New York
Box 2, 5
Series VI. Peggy Wood Interviews
Box 6
Cite As:
Frank T. Wood papers, #4865. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Friendly societies -- Afro-American. Literacy -- Africa. African Americans -- New York (State) -- Syracuse. Social service -- New York (State) -- Syracuse. Public welfare -- New York (State) -- Syracuse. Wood, Peggy. National Republican Party -- : New York (State) -- : Syracuse.
